sections.paragraph: ἐάω [etym. uncertain; the basic idea is removal of real or perceived impediment to a desired action] ‘let something happen/take place’, permit, allow, let Mt 24:43; Ac 14:16; 23:32 (apparently after having provided adequate protection to the cavalry); 28:4; 1 Cor 10:13; of a skiff permitted to drop into the water after removal of constraints Ac 27:32; cp. vs. 40 of anchors εἴων εἰς τὴν ϑάλασσαν let down into the water. —ἐᾶτε ἕως τούτου = No more of this! Lk 22:51.
